case_title: IBEW LOCAL 6 RESPONDENT VS. BRUCE J GREEN APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-16-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT GREEN, BRUCE J TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT IBEW LOCAL 6 $0.00 PRINCIPAL, $0.00 TOTAL; NO EVIDENCE WAS INTRODUCED TO SHOW THE BASIS FOR THE IMPOSITIONS OF CHARGES AGAINST APPELLANT WHETHER AS A FINE, GENERAL OR SPECIAL DAMAGES, OR LIQUIDATED DAMAGES. WHILE APPELLANT MAY HAVE VIOLATED THE INTERNAL AGREEMENT, RESPONDENT HAS GIVEN NO BASIS FOR CALCULATING DAMAGES, FOR THAT VIOLATION. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Kevin Tumminia appears in Pro Per to represent Respondent IBEW local 6; Trevor Jackson, Esq. appears for Appellant Bruce J. Green.
9:10am
Due to the case being lengthy, Judge Myles asks parties to return at 11:15am, so he can hear the other shorter cases first.
11:30am
Above parties appear in court. Mr. Tumminia, as Respondent presents his case in the narrative, Mr. Jackson and Mr. Green respond. Judge Myles questions parties.
